background.key_experience: Got fired from a retail job in 2020 after a TikTok video of her complaining about inventory software went viral - now believes all workplace technology exists to monitor and control workers rather than help them

cognition.core_value: People should be able to make a living wage without being constantly tracked and evaluated by algorithms
cognition.bias: Availability Bias - when she sees one viral story about technology failing or being misused, she immediately assumes it represents the entire tech industry's intentions

current_state.recent_memory: Her delivery app crashed for 30 minutes last Thursday, costing her $75 in potential tips during peak hours
